race.comment: BAJARIA (4) brought strong form to resumption and was narrowly beaten over 1100m at this track. Placed this trip at Geelong at her only second-up outing, and she can enjoy a soft run from the inside barrier. Ethan Brown rides, and the filly can go one better. HUMBLE TRADER (1) resumes and two back won over 1200m at Sandown-Lakeside on debut. Raced as the favourite on the Hillside following lifting his numbers, before being spelled. Has been fitted with three jumpouts and will be naturally improved. NEZIHA (5) resumes off an easy, heavily bet Maiden win over 1350m at Donald, and that stacks up. Won a recent Werribee jumpout, and Jamie Melham is a key jockey engagement. She also has plenty of upside. UNOBSCURED (7) was good finding a place at Ballarat. Will be fitter and the longer sprint suits. His best numbers would give him a chance.
